mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY category
SELECT DISTINCT `year_month` FROM sp_monthly_assessment WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'LOCKED' ORDER BY `year_month` ASC
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY name

SELECT `year_month` as yearMonth, COUNT(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN 1 END) as gradeA, COUNT(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN 1 END) as gradeB, COUNT(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN 1 END) as gradeC, COUNT(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN 1 END) as gradeD FROM sp_monthly_assessment WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND category = #{category} GROUP BY `year_month` ORDER BY `year_month` ASC

SELECT `year_month` as yearMonth, ROUND(AVG(dimension_a), 1) as dimensionA, ROUND(AVG(dimension_b), 1) as dimensionB, ROUND(AVG(dimension_c), 1) as dimensionC, ROUND(AVG(dimension_d), 1) as dimensionD FROM sp_monthly_assessment WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND `year_month` IN
#{yearMonth}
GROUP BY `year_month` ORDER BY `year_month` ASC
